MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-16-2023 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-16-2023 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF DONATUS MCCOY'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS UNOPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2023 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2023 Continued To Aug-30-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar May-16-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF DONATUS MCCOY's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and [proposed] consent judgment" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was unopposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2023 Continued To Jun-28-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
